examples: Twenty million years ago, Idaho was populated by dense primordial forest.
It is hypothesized that the primordial cloud of dust and gas from which all the planets are thought to have condensed had a composition somewhat similar to that of Jupiter.
Twenty million years ago, Idaho was not the arid place it is now. Rather, it was warm and damp, populated by dense primordial forest.
Asteroid 99942 Apophis is a primordial relic from the formation of our Solar System.
Ah, the Olympia oyster, the plains buffalo of western mollusks: a golden memory of primordial abundance.
